title: Super-class Star Destroyer
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Super''-class Star Destroyer}} {{Youmay|The [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] fictional class|the [[Canon]] [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought|Super Star Destroyer]]}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:Super-class.jpg]] |name=''Super''-class Star Destroyer |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' |line=[[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]] |model=''Super''-class Star Destroyer |type=Super Star Destroyer |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=8,000 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel=1230 g |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=Class 2 |hdrange= |hdsystem=[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Equipped]] |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*Heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries (250) *Turbolaser batteries (250) *[[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannons]] (250) *[[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion missile]] [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|tubes]] (250) *[[Tractor beam/Legends|Tractor beam]] [[Tractor beam projector/Legends|emplacements]] (40) |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=280,734 |skeleton= |passengers=38,000 troops |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=*[[Command ship/Legends|Command ship]] *[[Carrier/Legends|Carrier]] *[[Battleship/Legends|Battleship]] |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} {{Quote|''Victory''-class?''"
"''Bigger than that."''
"Imperial''-class?"''
"''Try again.''"
"''No.''"
"''Yep. ''Super''-class.|Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian, concerning the ''Executor''|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]}} The '''''Super''-class Star Destroyer''' was a fictional [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] model invented for budgetary reasons, whose name later became a popular military colloquialism for heavy warships of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and successor-governments.[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] ==Characteristics== The ''Super''-class was described as 8,000 meters long, armed with 250 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, 250 heavy turbolaser batteries, 250 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], 250 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] tubes, and 40 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors. It would carry twelve [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] (including two [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]] squadrons) and more than fifty other small craft. For ground operations, it would carry a full [[Corps/Legends|corps]] of ground troops, apparently mixing [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Legion/Legends|legions]] with regular [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] personnel, plus 25 [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]], 50 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], and three [[IM-455 modular garrison|prefabricated garrison bases]]. It would have been crewed by 280,734. A single ship of this class would be considered the equal of ten or twenty [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], and they were meant to be used as [[Command ship/Legends|command ships]] by many of the most important [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleets]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. ==History== [[File:Executor_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The fake schematics of the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].]] The name "''Super''-class Star Destroyer" was invented by [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] officials and used in its budget requests to the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] during the design and construction phase of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]]. This ruse was made to hide the true nature of the class, even going so far as to understate its size and armament, so that oversight committees would not discover its true role. By the time the first vessel, [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], was operational, the official designation had been changed to its original intention, but [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] and ''Super''-class Star Destroyer had stuck in people's minds and was applied to other models, like the [[Sovereign-class Super Star Destroyer|''Sovereign''-class]] and [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class]].{{SWMiniCite|set=Starship Battles|parent=1|rulebook=1}} {{C|rulebook}} One of these budget requests which included the "''Super''-class" and several other capital ship designs was sent to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] advisors on budgetary affairs. This document found its way into the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], where it was used as a primary source regarding the Empire's [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] capabilities by [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]]. The Empire publicly revealed that four ''Super''-class Star Destroyers, specifically ''Executor''-class vessels, were completed by the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Circa [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Imperial gunner [[Tenn Graneet]] hoped he would be assigned to one of them. ===Legacy=== Even into the time of the [[New Jedi Order]], both the terms "Super Star Destroyer" and "''Super''-class Star Destroyer" were still in use, and over the decades came to refer to several distinct designs. The ''[[Megador]]'', a Star Dreadnought with sixteen ion engines, was also referred to as a ''Super''-class Star Destroyer during the [[Battle of Uroro Station]]. ==Behind the scenes== Since 2004, the ''Executor''-class were described as [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnoughts]] at 19 kilometers in length. The issue had some controversy, as many older sources described the ''Executor'' as either an 8- or 12.8-kilometer-long ''Super''-class Star Destroyer. On March 9, 2006, the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''Star Wars'' Q&A section reiterated that the ''Executor'' was 19 kilometers, "as are all Super Star Destroyers of the same class."''[http://www.wizards.com/default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20060309jc84 Jedi Counseling 84]'' This kept the 8-kilometer ''Super''-class as a possibility, as such ships could belong to a different class from ''Executor''. However, with the ''[http://www.wizards.com/default.asp?x=starwars/article/SBPreview1 Starship Battles Preview 1]'' preview article on October 19, 2006, the ''Super''-class was [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] as explicitly fake, being used to hide the much larger ''Executor'' Star Dreadnought class. On November 16, 2007, the [[Databank (original)|official Databank]] updated the ''Executor'' article, pointing out that the term "''Super''-class Star Destroyer" was only used unofficially, alongside "Super Star Destroyer," with "''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought" being the ship class's real designation. The [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|updated edition]] of ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' repeated the information, even adding more Super Star Destroyer variants to the mix and using both "Super Star Destroyer" and "''Super''-class Star Destroyer" interchangeably as general descriptions. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{Mo}} *{{JournalCite|12|Small Favors}} of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' ===Non-canon appearances=== *{{ChallengeCite|38|Starfighters Down}} {{Un}}
